svg.title: Project Manager product poster
svg.desc: A product poster for Project Manager highlighting portfolio visibility, task delivery, Gantt planning, critical path, risks, reports, reviews, notifications, and automation.
svg.text: 从项目组合到高效交付
让项目、任务、排期、风险与自动化能力
在统一工作空间中协同运转。

g.text: 项目健康度与全局可见
项目健康度、进度与交付状态
里程碑、任务依赖与计划偏差
